svg.title: Spreadsheet-Native Orders Document

g.text: Expanded artboard for the golden-flow pack, re-laid directionally to keep Inventory left, Sales Order right, and seeded entry, quote mode, and finalize trust cues visibly adjacent.
Source: OrderCreatorPage + Sales Sheet seed flow

svg.text: The screenshot direction is carried forward, but all existing order-create capability remains visible: seeded entry, quote mode, draft restore, inventory browse, document editing, referral, credit, whole-order changes, save state, and explicit finalize trust cues.

g.text: Left-side inventory browser stays dominant so operators can search, compare stock, and add rows without losing spreadsheet context.
Inventory remains a live add-to-order workspace, not a detached lookup modal.
The document grid stays on the right: line editing, paste/fill, pricing, margin review, quote-versus-order mode, and trust-critical workflow cues remain together.
5 line items · Running total $3,308 · Spreadsheet edits stay in-grid; workflow transitions stay explicit.
Blocked pricing or credit feedback remains visible after bad edits
Keep referral ownership visible and editable without burying it in a right-rail inspector.
Credit availability and trust cues stay adjacent to order creation, but approval remains explicit.
Order-level notes, margin overrides, freight, terms, and seed/quote/finalize guardrails stay visible under the document instead of hiding in a deep inspector.
The directional layout does not reduce scope: ?fromSalesSheet seeds, salesSheetToQuote mode, draft restore, undo, save, credit review, pricing feedback, and explicit finalize remain in view.
4 items · seeded draft · document mode: Sales Order
Golden State · Cmd/Ctrl+S Save draft · Cmd/Ctrl+Enter Finalize draft · Q quote mode
Inventory left, Sales Order right, support modules below; seeded entry, draft restore, and finalize stay explicit.
